keep_rule: Keep only when candidate beats baseline, held-out passes, traps pass, and evidence proves a real capability gain.
revert_rule: Reject score-only, wording-only, stale-evidence, or unverified mutations.
rollback_rule: Rollback the mutation and clear any durable doctrine proposal when raw runner output contradicts the wrapper, held-out fails, traps fail, or evidence is missing.
round_history_policy: Record every round in the validation ledger. Clear active round state after rejection; preserve accepted round summaries only after sidecar review.
durable_doctrine_rule: A pattern may become durable doctrine only after it improves a measured decision dimension and creates an agent-facing lesson that transfers beyond the exact case.
